title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Althaea officinalis essential oils contains mucilages like glucuronic acid, rhamnose, and arabinose, which are powerful anti-inflammatory agents. These mucilages help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the colon, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with ulcerative colitis. The essential oil's demulcent properties create a protective barrier on the mucous membranes, shielding them from irritation and allowing them to heal.
